title.en: Designing a Data Pipeline: From Raw Data to Reliable Insights
title.es: Diseñando un Data Pipeline: del dato crudo a los reportes confiables

description.en: Design an ETL pipeline architecture for Veridian Logistics: analyze nightly CSV exports with updates-as-inserts, document deduplication and idempotency strategies, specify execution logging, and produce a production-ready PIPELINE_DESIGN.md — no code implementation.
description.es: Diseña la arquitectura de un pipeline ETL para Veridian Logistics: analiza exportaciones CSV nocturnas con actualizaciones como inserts, documenta estrategias de deduplicación e idempotencia, especifica el logging de ejecución y produce un PIPELINE_DESIGN.md listo para producción — sin implementación de código.

sharing.en: I just completed Designing a Data Pipeline: From Raw Data to Reliable Insights with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/designing-a-data-pipeline #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #dataengineering #etl #architecture
